case_title: JAMES NICHOLAS NEAL VS. BONITA COHN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT COHN, BONITA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT NEAL, JAMES NICHOLAS DESTRUCTION OF PROPERTY CLAIM WAS PREVIOUSLY ADJUDICATED; NO EVIDENCE ON OTHER CLAIMS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,320.00 FILED BY NEAL, JAMES NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT COHN, BONITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2018 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-09-2018 Set For Trial On May-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-09-2018 Continued To May-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-09-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Nicholas Neal, on behalf of plaintiff/respondent is present with witness Andre Godoy.
600 Presidio Avenue, San Francisco, CA. 94115 Tel.(415) 879-2384.
Bonita Cohn, on behalf of defendant/appellant is present.
1538 Jones St. San Francisco, CA. Tel.(415)673-0533

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

The following documents are submitted to the court for review only:
- Hot Bench Arbitration Agreement (4 pages)
- transcription tiled Neal vs.Cohn (1 page

Both parties testify on their behalf.

Documents returned to parties by mail. No exhibits were presented to the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Rosallie Gumpal, Not Reported, (306).
